identity.name: David Caldicott
identity.mission: I help people and systems become whole.

offers.title: Coaching — Connect Your Dots
offers.summary: Authenticity-focused coaching for capable people tired of performing a version of themselves that isn't quite them. Built on SAHARA and KIMBA. Start free with the five-day challenge, book a conversation, or book a Breakthrough (£497).

offers.title: AI Systems & Automation Consultancy
offers.summary: Design and build of AI-native operational systems — agent meshes, automation pipelines, content systems.

intents.title: People who are capable and at odds with themselves
Builders of systems that serve people rather than extract from them
Operators who want AI that actually works for their business
People building their own ground — toward a web people own
